name: Sensational Buckwheat-Wheat Bake
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Slivered almonds - OR - sunflower seeds
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the buckwheat groats and cracked wheat in a bowl and set aside.
2. Heat safflower oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
3. Add diced onion, celery, and bell pepper to the skillet. Cook until light brown, stirring occasionally.
4. Stir in onion powder, garlic powder, chili powder, poultry seasoning, and dried rosemary.
5. Add sliced mushrooms and cook until they begin to brown.
6. Stir in diced tomatoes and cook for 2 minutes.
7. Pour in the remaining ingredients (buckwheat groats mixture) and mix well.
8. Transfer the mixture to a lightly oiled baking dish.
9. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes, or until heated through and golden brown on top.
